description: A White House-branded graphic in portrait format with a dark palette. The upper half is a desaturated photo of Trump standing in an ornate gilded room wearing a dark navy suit, light blue shirt, red tie and an American flag lapel pin. Centered in very large white serif all-caps is the slogan 'AMERICANS FIRST'. The lower half is an embedded line-chart card on a light background titled 'Total Native-Born Employment Level', with a legend distinguishing 'Biden Administration' (blue line) and 'Trump Administration (so far)' (red line). The x-axis runs Nov. 2023 through Nov. 2025, the y-axis 'Total employment (thousands)' from 129,000 to 134,000; a dashed vertical line labeled 'Inauguration' marks the transition, with the blue Biden line flat and the red Trump line rising afterward. The card is footed with 'THE WHITE HOUSE' and the seal appears at the very bottom.
notable_text: AMERICANS FIRST; Total Native-Born Employment Level; Biden Administration vs Trump Administration (so far); Inauguration; THE WHITE HOUSE
